headline: Director, Emerging Products at Adobe, building GenAI products after co-founding Rephrase.ai
title: Director, Emerging Products
confidenceNote: Personal site, LinkedIn, and acquisition coverage consistently connect Ashray Malhotra with Adobe, Rephrase.ai, and generative AI video/product work.
bioMarkdown: Director of Emerging Products at Adobe, with recent work around Adobe Brand Intelligence Predict and synthetic audiences. Previously co-founded and led Rephrase.ai, an AI video startup acquired by Adobe, making him a strong match for product, GenAI video, creative tooling, and startup-to-enterprise discussions.

primary.label: Personal website
primary.note: States GenAI at Adobe and ex-CEO/co-founder of Rephrase.ai, acquired by Adobe.
